a_level_admissions.primaryEvidenceUse: Strong Cambridge economics background and ability to explain mathematical/economic ideas clearly for exams, TMUA and Oxbridge admissions.
a_level_admissions.researchRole: Included where it helps students understand subject depth.

university_postgraduate.primaryEvidenceUse: University teaching experience, archived teaching materials and research evidence in econometrics, statistics and applied economics.
university_postgraduate.researchRole: Relevant evidence for advanced econometrics, dissertation, MSc and PhD-level support.

researchPagePolicy: research.html is for papers, working papers, RePEc/Academia records, PDFs, seminar slides and conference presentations.
teachingVideoPolicy: Teaching videos are kept on teaching.html#teaching-videos and are not treated as research outputs.
